overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along railway tracks during a dramatic nighttime thunderstorm. The character traverses from a wooded area into open prairie, approaching a distant lit ranch building with mountains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: railway track through pine forest edge

events.description: bright lightning strike illuminates the left side of the sky and landscape
lightning bolt strikes on the right side creating brief illumination

agents.ego_description: cowboy character walking steadily along the path beside railway tracks

entered.detail: metal railway tracks running parallel to the walking path
tall evergreen trees lining the left side of the tracks
wooden utility poles with crossbars extending into the distance
dark turbulent storm clouds covering the night sky with visible lightning

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a dramatic lightning strike as the character walks along a dirt path beside railway tracks. Tall pine trees line the left side while open grassland extends to the right. Telegraph poles recede into the distance under a turbulent stormy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie with distant mountain views

events.description: exits the tree-lined corridor into open grassland prairie
ranch building with warm lights becomes visible in the far distance

agents.ego_description: continuing along the railway path as the landscape opens into wide prairie

entered.detail: wooden ranch house with warm glowing windows visible in the distance
dark mountain silhouettes forming the horizon backdrop

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to open prairie as the trees fall behind. The railway tracks continue into the distance while a lit ranch building appears on the horizon. Mountains rise in the background under the continuing storm.

events.description: character walks directly beneath the darkest storm cloud formation
warm light from ranch building becomes more prominent against the blue darkness

agents.ego_description: approaching the lit ranch building through the stormy night

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the ranch building as the storm continues overhead. The railway tracks fade into the distance behind while the warm lights of the wooden ranch house grow larger and more detailed. Mountains loom on the right side under the dramatic cloud cover.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a railway line that transitions from a sheltered wooded path into an expansive, storm-swept prairie. It begins with a dramatic lightning strike as the character walks a dirt path flanked by tall pine trees and receding telegraph poles under a turbulent sky. As the trees fall behind, the scene opens into a wide grassland where the railway tracks stretch toward a distant, lit ranch building and looming mountains. The camera then advances toward the ranch, causing the tracks to fade into the distance while the warm lights of the wooden house grow larger and more detailed. Finally, the view settles on the glowing structure with the mountains towering on the right under the heavy, dramatic cloud cover.
